name: 分层、制度与社会情境
description: 用于把不平等、制度安排、婚姻市场、城乡分割和社会变迁作为解释背景或机制条件写出来。

clusters.meaning: 城乡分割、户籍和中国社会情境

expressions.note: 比 continuation 更社会学化，常用于结构性机制的长期后果。
expressions.example: Wealth arrangements may result in the perpetuation of inequality.

expressions.note: divide 比 difference 更结构化，适合 hukou、资源和文化差异。
expressions.example: The rural-urban divide shapes marriage practices.

expressions.note: arrangements 强调制度化或家庭内的资源组织，不只是 wealth level。
expressions.example: Family wealth arrangements may disadvantage women.

expressions.note: 在婚姻研究中比 dating context 更制度化，需接具体机制。
expressions.example: Housing assets matter in the marriage market.

expressions.note: 比 marriage practices by gender 更强调制度化性别逻辑。
expressions.example: Gendered marriage practices reproduce wealth inequality.

expressions.note: development 暗示历史变化，可接 volatile、uneven、rapid。
expressions.example: Uneven gender equity development shapes mental health.

expressions.note: 适合把家庭资源与个体事件连接，区别于 individual earnings。
expressions.example: Family-level economic determinants shape first marriage.

clusters.meaning: 婚姻市场、家庭财富和资源安排

expressions.note: 适合从宏观变化转入本文研究，不要滥用在无背景处。
expressions.example: Against this background, we examine changing family ties.

expressions.en: X provides a unique social context for examining Y.
expressions.note: 适合中国研究避免只做地区描述，强调可解释性条件。
expressions.example: China provides a unique social context for examining family change.

expressions.en: Set up macro change before micro-level analysis.
expressions.note: 适合中国研究，不让案例背景变成普通介绍。
expressions.example: We link educational expansion to couple-level trajectories.

expressions.en: Connect family-level resources to individual life events.
expressions.note: 适合家庭分层研究，避免只写个人收入或教育。
expressions.example: Family wealth shapes the timing of first marriage.

expressions.note: volatile 强调变化快且方向不稳，uneven 强调不同群体或领域不同步。
expressions.example: China witnessed volatile and uneven gender equity development.

expressions.note: 比 racial groups 更强调种族分类的社会建构和权力关系。
expressions.example: Effects vary across racialized groups.

expressions.note: 常与 status maintenance 搭配，解释教育、婚配和分层后果。
expressions.example: Marriage may offer potential upward social mobility.

clusters.meaning: 性别化、种族化和结构性不平等

expressions.en: practical needs for higher living standards
expressions.note: 用于解释经济需求如何压过传统规范。
expressions.example: Practical needs shape assortative marriage outcomes.

expressions.note: 适合婚配、教育和职业选择中的社会分层机制。
expressions.example: Marriage may serve status maintenance and mobility.

expressions.note: 适合宏观层面解释婚配和流动模式。
expressions.example: Marriage patterns reflect the openness of a society.

expressions.note: 一组固定搭配，适合把家庭或婚配结果连接到宏观不平等。
expressions.example: Assortative marriage affects stratification and mobility.

expressions.note: 适合解释婚配、就业、性别差距和代际流动变化。
expressions.example: Educational expansion reshaped assortative mating.

expressions.note: 用于描述结构性趋势，常与 widening gap 对照。
expressions.example: The narrowing gender gap changed mating patterns.

clusters.meaning: 宏观社会变迁、教育扩张和社会流动

expressions.note: 适合表达教育改善未必带来收入或健康平等。
expressions.example: The gender gap widened over the marital course.

expressions.note: 适合从社会结构、制度和文化变化开始解释。
expressions.example: At the macro level, patterns reflect social openness.

expressions.note: 适合把宏观变化连接到家庭、夫妻和组织关系。
expressions.example: At the meso level, changes affect power dynamics.

expressions.en: At the macro level, X; at the meso level, Y.
expressions.note: 适合讨论社会变迁如何进入家庭或夫妻关系。
expressions.example: At the macro level, education expanded; at the meso level, couples renegotiated roles.

expressions.en: Turn macro educational expansion into couple-level power dynamics.
expressions.note: 适合中国研究中从背景到机制的推进。
expressions.example: Educational expansion reshapes couple-level power dynamics.

expressions.note: 适合说明同一财富概念内部机制不同。
expressions.example: We deconstruct family wealth into assets and savings.
